name: Holiday Turkey and Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Red bell pepper julienne strips
1 can Mushroom stems and pieces, drained (4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the butter, turkey, flour, basil, salt, and pepper until combined.
3. Gradually add the chicken broth and milk, stirring until just mixed.
4. Fold in the red bell pepper julienne strips and mushroom pieces.
5. Shape the mixture into two biscuits and place on a baking sheet.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving with spinach julienne strips.
